questions.question: 5 (a) A farmer plants t trees each day. Write an expression for the number of trees he plants in d days. ................................................. [1] (b) A train has p passengers. x passengers get off the train and y passengers get on the train. Write an expression for the number of passengers on the train now. ................................................. [1] * 0000800000
